response.overview: A brief recording made by a Florida college student with his camrecorder of the of people inside a 7-11 gas station at 2:30 in August 1987.
response.tagline: Our next stop was the 7-11 just across 535 from Vista Village.  I wanted to get a Slurpee.  While I was getting it, Ken decided to grab my camcorder and document the experience.
response.title: 2:30am at 7-11 near Disney World
